_comment: Durable, reviewable record of gs://ikaro-tfstate's intended security configuration (TD27). Verified against live GCP state on 2026-07-22 (docs/BOOTSTRAP_LOG.md, M17-S08 + M17-S24). Checked by the 'Verify state bucket security (TD27)' step in .github/workflows/infra-deploy.yml's drift-prod job. Update this file (in the same PR) whenever a deliberate, reviewed change to the bucket's security posture is made out-of-band.
_allowedBucketIamBindings_comment: Exhaustive allow-list, checked bidirectionally: every entry here must be present in the live policy (catches removal/weakening), and every live binding must match an entry here (catches an unexpected addition, e.g. a new grant to an unrelated principal). Includes GCS's own default legacy-ACL-derived bindings (legacyBucketOwner/Reader, legacyObjectOwner/Reader tied to projectEditor/Owner/Viewer) — these are automatic, not something anyone explicitly granted, but still need to be allow-listed since they're real entries in the live policy.
_requiredProjectIamBindings_comment: Checked for exact uniqueness, not just presence: GCP IAM evaluates bindings additively (OR), so an extra permissive binding for the same role+member would defeat this one even while it remains present. Each entry must match exactly one live binding for its (role, member) pair.
